title: Identity Theft Reporting/Recovery Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF COOS BAY PDCONNECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community members a service to report experiencing or witnessing a suspected city code violation such as illegal campsites, street maintenance, abandoned vehicles, non-emergency tip line, identify theft or fraud, or other public nuisances. 500 Central Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION NORTHWEST REGION IDENTITY THEFT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on identity theft, including immediate steps to repair identity theft, extending fraud alerts and credit freezes, and repairing credit after identity theft. 915 Second Avenue Suite 2896 Seattle, WA 98174 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Get Directions Visit Website More Details IDENTITY THEFT RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information, advice, and resources in regard to the topic of identity and cybercrimes. Examples of assistance provided may include assistance in filing police reports, determining what information scammers may have, filing reports with the Federal Trade Commission (FTC), notifying financial institutions, and document recovery, among other services. Eligibility: Individuals who are victims of identify or cybercrimes Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-5pm, closed federal holidays Email (888) 400-5530 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF COOS BAY PDCONNECT FEDERAL TRADE COMMISSION NORTHWEST REGION IDENTITY THEFT
